extension.summary: Set up the SoLoKodi Kids build with every official kids source and a fun theme.
extension.description: Installs all official kids, family, and educational add-ons from the Kodi repository — PBS Kids, TVO Kids, YouTube, Pluto TV, NASA, ESA, BBC iPlayer, WDR Maus, ZDF Tivi — creates home-screen shortcuts, and applies a colorful Bello skin. Optional Real-Debrid connection for parent-managed media.

extension.summary: SoLoKodi Kids build — fun Kodi setup for children.
extension.description: The SoLoKodi Kids repository ships a setup wizard that installs every official kids source we could find, applies a colorful theme, and creates one-tap shortcuts for PBS Kids, TVO Kids, YouTube, Pluto TV, NASA, CBeebies, and more.
